message: Operation 'post-invoices' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks critical details about required input fields, what the response contains, and side effects (invoice is persisted). data.description_suggestion: Creates a new invoice with the provided customer and line item details. Accepts invoice data including customer ID, items, amounts, and dates.
